ai.title: gotrippin AI
ai.empty_reply: I'm sorry, something went wrong generating that reply. Could you try asking again or rephrasing your question?
ai.empty_state_tagline: Ask anything about travel — destinations, ideas, or a trip you’re shaping.
ai.wizard_intro_body: Answer a few quick questions and we’ll shape a starting plan. You can skip and chat freely anytime.
ai.post_wizard_partner_invite_body: You said others are joining. Send one email invite now, or skip and invite later from the trip page.
ai.wizard_collab_email_required: Enter an email address to send an invite.
ai.attach_trip_drawer_hint: Choose a trip to include its details in this chat.
ai.model_glm5_subtitle: Full stack for itineraries, tools, and streaming
ai.model_more_soon_body: You're on GLM-5 via OpenRouter. Picking other models from the catalog is planned soon.
ai.add_stops_need_trip: Create a trip first — then you can add stops to your route here.
ai.placeholder: Where do you want to go next?
ai.no_chats_yet: No chats yet. Start with "New chat".
ai.delete_chat_confirm: Delete this chat? This cannot be undone.
ai.cover_answer_questions_first: Answer the questions above before choosing a cover.
ai.map_need_coords: When places include map coordinates, your route preview appears here.
ai.itinerary_copy_tsv_hint: Tab-separated values — paste into Google Sheets or Excel.
ai.save_plan_to_trips_failed: Could not save this plan as a trip
ai.save_plan_to_trips_need_coords: These places need map coordinates before we can save them. Wait for place details to load, or ask the assistant to suggest stops with locations.
ai.save_plan_to_trips_one_stop_hint: You can add more stops anytime in the route editor.
ai.save_plan_pick_trip_hint: Choose a trip to append these stops to. Your existing route stays; new stops are added at the end.
ai.itinerary_clipboard_failed: Could not copy to the clipboard
ai.itinerary_open_route_need_two_coords: Add coordinates to at least two stops to open directions in Google Maps.
ai.photo_gallery_hint: Tap a photo for full-screen zoom (same viewer as trip gallery).

trips.no_trips_description: Start planning your next adventure by creating your first trip!
trips.create_background_nudge_description: Pick a cover photo or color, or skip — we will use a default style on your map.
trips.create_tour_name_body: Give your trip a short, memorable name. You can change it later.
trips.route_step_ready_body: Next we’ll open the map-based route editor so you can sketch your trip from A to B. When you’re done there, your trip will be saved.
trips.route_step_ready_short: Add your first stop on the map — we'll create your trip when you do.
trips.plan_with_ai_bootstrap: I'm on create-trip step 2 (before the route map). Working title: "{{title}}". Travel dates: {{dates}}. Help me plan stops and the route.
trips.trip_created_first_stop: Trip created — add more stops or continue.
trips.youre_all_set_description: Add more stops or tap the itinerary below.
trips.congrats_description: You've created your trip. Add more stops anytime from the map or view your itinerary.
trips.dates_shift_partial_failed: Trip dates updated, but some route or activity dates could not be moved. Try editing stops on the route.
trips.schedule_repair_needed: Some stops or activities are outside the new trip dates. Set new dates below, or cancel to undo the trip date change.
trips.dates_change_blocked_stops_or_activities: These dates would leave stops or activities outside the trip (including after shifting for a new start date). Move or reschedule them on the route or timeline, then try again.
trips.schedule_repair_description: Everything must fall within your new trip dates. Adjust each item, then save.
trips.schedule_repair_rolled_back: Trip dates reverted to the previous range.
trips.schedule_repair_rollback_failed: Could not undo the trip date change. Refresh and try again.
trips.join_already_member: You are already on this trip
trips.export_pdf_success: Print view opened — use Save as PDF in the print dialog
trips.export_pdf_popup_blocked: Allow pop-ups for this site, or open the trip’s Print page from the address bar.
trips.viewer_mode_banner: View only — you can browse this trip but not change it.
trips.viewer_cannot_edit: Only editors can add activities or change the trip.
trips.concurrent_edit_hint: We refreshed the page so you see the latest version.

trip_overview.route_tour_itinerary: Stops appear here. Drag to reorder, tap to edit dates.
trip_overview.route_tour_find_guide: Tap the ? button anytime to see these steps again.

trip_overview.add_documents_description: Start adding documents to your trip. You can add photos, links, emails, notes and files.

trip_overview.notes_placeholder: Write anything for this trip… packing lists, meeting spots, links, class brief.

date_picker.title: Select Dates

timeline_location.context_lead: Notes and context for everyone on this trip.
timeline_location.context_body: Use this area for meeting points, links, or reminders. Add timed activities in the list below.
timeline_location.map_need_coordinates: Add locations with map pins to your stops to see the route here.
timeline_location.map_unavailable: Map preview isn’t available in this environment.

weather.add_stops_body: Your trip route has no locations yet. Add at least one stop and come back here.
weather.stop_error_title: Couldn’t fetch weather for this stop
weather.stop_error_hint_dates: This usually means the stop’s date range is invalid. Check arrival/departure dates.

hero.lead: Stop juggling threads and spreadsheets. gotrippin is a web-first group trip planner: a shared map and timeline, an AI assistant in context, and one link so everyone sees the same itinerary.

story.title: Group trips shouldn’t live in five apps.
story.body: When the plan is scattered across screenshots, map pins, and chat threads, someone always misses the update. gotrippin keeps the route and the shared itinerary in one place on the web—fewer tabs, fewer crossed wires.

map_section.title: One map for the whole group trip
map_section.body: Order your stops, preview the path, and reshuffle when plans change. The map stays tied to the timeline so your crew is looking at the same trip—not a stale export or a half-finished doc.
map_section.image_alt: gotrippin route map with ordered stops along the path
map_section.caption: Real product view: your shared route stays visible while the itinerary evolves.

ai_section.title: AI help inside your trip planning
ai_section.body: Use the assistant to suggest stops, tighten a day-by-day plan, or get unstuck—without leaving your trip. You stay in charge; it speeds up the messy middle of group planning.
ai_section.card: Answers stay grounded in your trip—not generic travel filler.

together_section.title: One link. Same shared plan for everyone.
together_section.body: Each trip has a link your group can open in the browser. Everyone sees the same map and itinerary while you refine it. Deeper guest roles and co-editing are on the roadmap—today, one honest source of truth beats another lost thread.
together_section.view_body: Share the trip link so friends and family can follow along with stops, dates, and details you've published.
together_section.edit_body: Editing together is on the roadmap. For now, plan as the trip owner and keep everyone aligned with a single shared view.
together_section.footnote: You'll use the same account flow to open trips; detailed guest permissions will show up here as we ship them.

bento.section_title: Shared itinerary, map, and AI—built for groups
bento.section_lead: Plan the trip on the web first: one calm place for your crew before you head out.
bento.map_desc: Sequence stops, preview the path, and adjust together—without losing the big picture.
bento.ai_desc: Brainstorm and refine the itinerary with context from your actual trip.
bento.share_desc: One URL opens the same map and plan for everyone. Richer permissions and co-editing are coming.

native_apps.title: Web today. Native apps planned.
native_apps.body: gotrippin runs in your browser now—no install required. Dedicated iOS and Android apps are on our roadmap so you can pick up the same trip on the go when they ship.
native_apps.card: We’re not listing app stores yet. Follow progress on GitHub if you want native clients as soon as they’re ready.

trust.title: We’re building in the open
trust.body: gotrippin is early. If group trip planning has been painful for you, try the web app and tell us what matters—we read GitHub issues and use feedback to steer the roadmap.

sheets_teaser.title: Why not just a spreadsheet?
sheets_teaser.body: Sheets are flexible, but they’re easy to fork, easy to lose in chat, and weak at geography. gotrippin keeps stops, dates, and the route visually linked so “the latest plan” isn’t whichever file someone forwarded last.

items.question: Is gotrippin free to use?
items.answer: You can start planning on the web for free. Pricing may evolve as the product grows—we’ll be upfront about any paid tiers before they affect how you work.

items.question: Do I need to install an app?
items.answer: No. gotrippin works in a modern browser today. Native iOS and Android apps are planned; we don’t claim they’re available until they ship.

items.question: How does sharing a trip work?
items.answer: Each trip has a link you can send your group. People with the link can view the map and itinerary you’ve set up. Fine-grained guest roles and collaborative editing are improving over time.

items.question: Can everyone edit the same trip?
items.answer: Today, plan as the trip owner and share a read-friendly view with your group. Editing together from multiple accounts is on the roadmap—we’re honest about what’s live now versus what’s coming.

items.question: Is my data only on this device?
items.answer: Trips live in your account on our servers so you can open them from any browser where you’re signed in. We don’t market “offline-first” unless that’s explicitly shipped.

final_cta.title: Ready to plan your next adventure?
final_cta.sub: Start free, invite your group when you're ready, and keep every stop in one calm place.

cookie_notice.body: We use essential cookies and similar storage to keep you signed in (via our auth provider), protect sessions, and remember your language. We do not use third-party advertising or analytics cookies on gotrippin today.
